basic_details.job_title: NIT Kurukshetra Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Research Assistant and Field Investigator Posts
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technology Kurukshetra (NIT Kurukshetra)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Kurukshetra (NIT Kurukshetra) Recruitment 2026: National Institute of Technology Kurukshetra has released the official notification for 3 Research Assistant and Field Investigator posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking education jobs.

age_limit.age_details: As per Government of India norms
age_limit.details: As per Government of India norms.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate in Social Science Discipline with a minimum 55% marks with NET/Ph.D/M.Tech for Research Assistant and Graduate in the Social Science Discipline with a minimum 55% marks for Field Investigator.
qualification.details: Research Assistant: Post Graduate in Social Science Discipline with a minimum 55% marks with NET/Ph.D/M.Tech. Relevant research/industrial experience and technical knowledge (R & Python Language) will be preferred. Field Investigator: Graduate in the Social Science Discipline with a minimum 55% marks. Preference will be given to candidates with a four-year degree program (e.g., B.Tech). Relevant research/industrial experience and technical knowledge (R & Python Language) will be preferred.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on merit and project requirements Interview (online or offline mode)
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Kurukshetra Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 08-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Research Assistant and Field Investigator posts at NIT Kurukshetra?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Research Assistant and Field Investigator positions at NIT Kurukshetra is 08 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Research Assistant and Field Investigator posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced by NIT Kurukshetra for the positions of Research Assistant (1 post) and Field Investigator (2 posts).

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: For the Research Assistant position, candidates must possess a Post Graduate degree in a Social Science Discipline with a minimum of 55% marks, along with NET/Ph.D/M.Tech.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification for the Field Investigator post?
faq.answer: The required qualification for the Field Investigator role is a Graduate degree in the Social Science Discipline with a minimum of 55% marks. Preference will be given to candidates with a four-year degree program.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Research Assistant post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 37,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Field Investigator position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Field Investigator post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 20,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for these positions at NIT Kurukshetra must be submitted via email.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on merit and project requirements, followed by an interview, which can be conducted online or offline.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for applying to NIT Kurukshetra recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for any category of candidates applying for these posts.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply?
faq.answer: The official notification and application details are available on the Institute's website. You can also find direct links in the 'Important Links' section of this article.
